svg.text: Three-service platform · Multi-tenant anomaly detection · Real-time WebSocket dashboard

Batched structured log events per project
router.py · main.py startup (DB init · Firebase · permissions seed)

API key routing · Project lifecycle orchestration
Session TTL: 30 min · Score window: 512 · Max sessions: 50k
● Rule-Based: SQL injection · XSS · Path traversal · Command injection
● Transformer: TemplateTransformer · causal attention · NLL score
● Isolation Forest: session features · statistical anomaly score
